purpose: Freeze the 47-feature H11 vocabulary while separating exact fixed5 derivations, fixed-grid proxies, and later causal sub-contracts.

allowed: causal contiguous suffix of canonical K_t
forbidden: external input/action/event logs as numeric evidence

source_codes.prediction_subcontract: G/K only after separate causal prediction contract
source_codes.recovery_subcontract: G/K only after separate causal recovery-event contract

common_claim_limits.reserved_prediction: Reserved until causal prediction sub-contract; no truth/RF-10 targets or duplicated motion substitutes.
common_claim_limits.reserved_recovery: Reserved until causal recovery-event sub-contract; no external event/outcome/future recovery labels.

features.f: constant 5 from the frozen fixed-axis contract; never fitted from data
features.lim: Compatibility metadata only; it carries no within-contract state information.

features.f: count(diag(covariance) > axis_variance_floor)
features.lim: Thresholded active-axis proxy, not proof of independent causal dimensions.

features.f: normalized Shannon entropy of non-negative axis variances after division by their sum
features.lim: Spread of covariance energy across fixed axes.

features.f: Hoyer sparsity of the five non-negative axis variances; zero vector is unavailable
features.lim: Sparsity of variance allocation, not semantic axis importance.

features.f: mean absolute off-diagonal correlation over axis pairs with both variances above floor
mean signed off-diagonal correlation over axis pairs with both variances above floor
exp(Shannon entropy of normalized non-negative covariance eigenvalues)
(sum eigenvalues)^2 / sum(eigenvalues^2); unavailable when total variance is zero
Shannon entropy of normalized covariance eigenvalues divided by log(5)
largest covariance eigenvalue divided by total covariance trace
features.lim: Dominance of the leading covariance direction.

features.f: (largest eigenvalue - second eigenvalue) / total covariance trace
absolute backward difference of effective_rank divided by delta_t
features.lim: Local change rate, not a forward estimate.

features.f: trace of the 5x5 covariance matrix on fixed axis coordinates
log determinant of covariance + covariance_regularization_epsilon * I
features.lim: Regularized volume proxy; epsilon and calibration version must be recorded.

features.f: 1 - smallest_eigenvalue / largest_eigenvalue; unavailable when largest_eigenvalue is zero
1 - covariance_trace / 1.25, clipped to [0,1]; 1.25 is the fixed-grid maximum total variance
features.lim: Fixed-grid second-moment compactness proxy, not physical compactness.

features.f: E[Euclidean distance(X,Y)] for independent X,Y drawn from current G_t on the fixed grid
features.lim: Exact distributional pairwise distance; deterministic precomputed grid distances allowed.

features.f: E[distance(X,Y)^2] - E[distance(X,Y)]^2; E[d^2] = 2 * covariance_trace
Shannon entropy of the 3125-cell mass distribution divided by log(3125)
variance of one-hop grid-neighborhood mass density over active cells, normalized by squared mean density
features.lim: Fixed-grid local-density proxy; not literal sample-space k-nearest-neighbor density.

features.f: maximum one-hop grid-neighborhood mass density divided by mean active-cell neighborhood density
mass on cells lying on at least one lower or upper fixed-grid boundary
features.lim: Boundary/extreme mass proxy; not a distribution-free statistical tail.

features.f: fraction of active cells whose one-hop neighborhood density is below outlier_density_fraction_of_peak times the peak neighborhood density
features.lim: Support-cell outlier proxy; not weighted anomaly probability.

features.f: number of major connected active components under the frozen RF-7 activity and minimum-mass thresholds
features.lim: Thresholded support-topology candidate, not true physical mode count.

features.f: normalized entropy of major-component masses; value 1 for one major component, unavailable for zero major components
Euclidean norm of centroid_t - centroid_t-1 divided by delta_t
Frobenius norm of covariance_t - covariance_t-1 divided by delta_t
L2 norm of the five exact one-dimensional Wasserstein-1 distances between corresponding axis marginals, divided by delta_t
features.lim: Axis-marginal transport proxy; not full joint 5D Wasserstein distance.

features.f: Jensen-Shannon distance between G_t-1 and G_t divided by delta_t
absolute backward difference of normalized entropy divided by delta_t

features.src: causal contiguous K_t suffix + fixed grid adjacency
features.f: L2 norm of the one-hop neighborhood-density field difference divided by delta_t
arccos(clipped cosine between consecutive non-zero centroid velocity vectors) divided by pi
features.lim: Unavailable when either velocity norm is below floor.

features.f: cosine between consecutive non-zero centroid velocity vectors
largest principal angle between leading covariance eigenspaces selected by frozen explained-variance rule, divided by pi/2
features.lim: Unavailable under eigenvalue degeneracy beyond tolerance.

features.f: Euclidean norm of centroid_velocity_t - centroid_velocity_t-1 divided by current delta_t
motion_angle divided by max(mean of the two consecutive centroid-step lengths, curvature_length_floor)
weighted fraction of axis-wise centroid-velocity sign reversals in the causal oscillation_window, ignoring below-floor velocities
features.lim: Centroid-level oscillation proxy; noise sensitivity must be audited.

features.f: one-step error from a separately frozen causal predictor; predictor must be fit only on history available before the predicted frame
causal-window variance of frozen-predictor residuals
absolute second backward difference of frozen-predictor residual magnitude
distance to a separately frozen causal reference state; no future outcome or externally supplied target may be used
causal-window instability of frozen-predictor outputs and residuals
time to halve deviation from a causally declared pre-deformation reference after an internally detected deformation event
current shape-feature distance from a causally declared pre-deformation reference
absolute normalized-entropy deviation from a causally declared pre-deformation reference
distance from current fixed5 distribution to a causally declared reference distribution
causal duration and retained magnitude of deviation after an internally detected deformation event
